current_workarounds: trial and error inside Claude Team plan
ai_infrastructure_setup_no_playbook.automation_opportunity: 90-day rollout map: NDA redline workflow + target/market primer templates in Claude Projects + LOI playbook + IC pre-read assembly. Stop trying to automate end-to-end before nailing the data layer.

example_quotes.author: u/Strong-Buy-6466
example_quotes.snippet: automating as much as possible across our workflow - NDA review, target primers, market primers, financial modeling, LOI drafting, reporting, etc

current_workarounds: outsourced extraction to analysts in India (expensive, unreliable)
alerts on LP repositories + manual review
manual_lp_doc_extraction.automation_opportunity: Don't hire a data engineer. Build a parsing pipeline: Docling/Unstructured.io for PDF → LLM for normalization with structured output → confidence scoring → human review for the 20-30% flagged. A research analyst with n8n + Claude can outpace a 2-person DE team for the first 18 months.

example_quotes.author: u/Away-Lengthiness-831
example_quotes.snippet: We had already identified repositories where LP documents are stored... someone reviews it and extracts the key metrics. Since the workload kept growing, we also outsourced part of it to analysts in India

current_workarounds: disappointment, missed deadlines, two data engineers struggling
gpt_chat_vs_api_gap.automation_opportunity: Stop demoing in chat. Prototype on the API from day one with a structured output schema, retries, and a confidence score. Build a tiny eval harness so you can swap models without re-checking everything by hand.

example_quotes.author: u/Away-Lengthiness-831
example_quotes.snippet: ChatGPT in the chat interface is not the same as ChatGPT through the API when you are trying to run a real production workflow

in_house_data_pipeline_drift.automation_opportunity: Narrow before you scale: nail extraction for the top 30 funds, prove accuracy, then expand. End-to-end automation before clean data layer = stuck in the mud at 70% accuracy forever.

example_quotes.author: u/Away-Lengthiness-831
example_quotes.snippet: now we're stuck in this awkward middle ground: too deep into the process to stop, but still far away from having something we can fully trust
